surface: testnet demo package id and readiness docs alignment
noTouch: sponsor wallet private keys or recovery material
npm registry credentials or real npm publish

optional: secret-oriented scan over tracked project files excluding ignored outputs
checks.browser: covered by npm run grant:check via smoke:demo-browser; no separate live browser automation in this local-only slice

downshiftProof: route-local because this slice only replaces the local demo package placeholder with a concrete package id, aligns docs/smokes/readiness messaging, and narrows local-tooling ignores. It does not contact IOTA RPC or Gas Station, run Docker, publish packages, touch secrets, or build dashboard surfaces.
knownFailures: Existing package publish-readiness manifest detect failed for this dirty slice because these package-id/readiness files were outside that slice's ownedFiles; this manifest owns the current changes.
notes: The concrete demo package id is public chain/package metadata, not a credential. The example readiness check now accepts a concrete package allowlist in --expect-placeholders mode while real readiness still fails closed on placeholder package ids. .gitignore ignores generated Apex detect/log artifacts without ignoring tracked slice manifests.
